diagrams.title: Template Instantiation Process
diagrams.description: Shows how a single function template generates multiple type-specific functions at compile-time
diagrams.purpose: Understanding how generic code becomes type-specific at compile-time

diagrams.title: Function Template Overload Resolution
diagrams.description: Decision tree showing how compiler selects between regular functions and function templates
elements: Select Best Match (Regular preferred over template)
diagrams.purpose: Understanding compiler's choice between template and non-template functions

diagrams.title: Template Specialization Hierarchy
diagrams.description: Shows relationship between generic template and its specializations
diagrams.purpose: Understanding specialization and which version gets selected

diagrams.title: Type Deduction Flowchart
diagrams.description: Visual representation of how compiler deduces template arguments from function arguments
